hoodType: kitchen hood suppression and vent systems
cleaningFrequencyBands: Charlotte Fire's interpretation says high-volume cooking needs hood-system service every 3 months.
Other cooking operations need hood-system service every 6 months.
certificateRequirement: Keep the latest hood-service report and any certificate or service paperwork on site.
serviceTagRequirement: Match the visible service tag to the most recent hood-service report.
reportRetentionRule: Retain the latest report and any follow-up corrections with the fire-prevention records.
suppressionInspectionRequirement: Charlotte Fire asks businesses to send life-safety inspection reports for hood suppression systems to the Prevention Bureau.
